% ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
% MACRO SOURCE AUDIT — Paper A
% ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
%
% This file documents which script produces each group of \newcommand macros
% in paper_a_primary_unesco.tex.  Every numeric value in the manuscript is
% generated by exactly one script; this table is the authoritative audit trail.
%
% To reproduce ALL macros, run from the repository root:
%   bash manuscript/reproduce_all_macros.sh
% (or run each script individually as listed below).
%
% ─── LEGEND ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
%   Script        = path relative to repository root
%   Macros        = \newcommand names produced by that script
%   Status        = OK (script exists in repo) / MISSING (script not found)
%   Notes         = any caveats (manual entry, derived, etc.)
%
% ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% │ GROUP 1: Dome / Spherical Monument Test (Test 2, raw sweep)
% │ Script: analysis/unesco/spherical_monument_raw_sweep.py          [OK]
% │ Macros:
% │   \NcircTotal, \NcircValidated, \NcircKeywords, \NcircExcluded,
% │   \NcircContextRejected, \NcircTierAp, \NcircTierA, \NcircTierB,
% │   \NcircTierC, \pCircAp, \pCircA, \pCircChi, \GerizimPctileAp,
% │   \GerizimPctileA, \circEnrichAp, \circEnrichA, \circMeanDev
% │ Context-validated version (Test 2x):
% │   analysis/unesco/spherical_monument_test.py                     [OK]
% └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% │ GROUP 2: Cluster Asymmetry Test (Test 3)
% │ Script: analysis/unesco/cluster_asymmetry_test.py                [OK]
% │ Macros:
% │   \NclusterTotal, \NclusterAp, \clusterApRate, \clusterApBinom,
% │   \clusterApMean, \clusterNonApMean, \clusterRatio, \clusterMWp,
% │   \clusterPermP, \clusterPermZ, \NclusterApHarmonics,
% │   \NclusterNonApHarmonics, \clusterHarmonicApMean,
% │   \clusterHarmonicNonApMean, \clusterHarmonicRatio,
% │   \clusterHarmonicMWp,
% │   \NclusterNodeAp, \NclusterAntiAp, \clusterNodeApMean,
% │   \clusterAntiApMean, \clusterNodeNonApMean, \clusterAntiNonApMean,
% │   \clusterNodeVsAntiApRatio, \clusterNodeVsAntiApMWp,
% │   \clusterNodeAllMean, \clusterAntiAllMean, \clusterNodeVsAntiAllMWp
% └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% │ GROUP 3: Harmonic Density Attractor Test
% │ Script: analysis/unesco/harmonic_density_attractor_test.py       [OK]
% │ Macros:
% │   \attractorApMeanN, \attractorNonApMeanN, \attractorMWp,
% │   \attractorMWpWide, \attractorSpearmanRho, \attractorSpearmanP,
% │   \attractorHarmonicRatio, \attractorHarmonicMWp, \attractorEUMWp,
% │   \NaraKyotoMaxDist
% └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% │ GROUP 4: Buddhist Heritage Test
% │ Script: analysis/unesco/unesco_buddhist_heritage_test.py          [OK]
% │ Macros:
% │   \NbudTotal, \NbudTierAp, \budApRate, \pBudAp, \budApEnrich,
% │   \NbudTierA, \budARate, \pBudA, \budAEnrich,
% │   \NbudMauryan, \NbudMauryanAp, \budMauryanApRate,
% │   \NbudEastAsian, \NbudEastAsianAp, \NbudSilkRoad, \NbudSilkRoadAp,
% │   \budSilkRoadApRate,
% │   \NbudAntiEligible, \NbudAntiAp, \budAntiApRate, \pBudAntiAp,
% │   \NbudAntiA, \budAntiARate, \pBudAntiA,
% │   \budNodeApRate, \budFisherOR, \budFisherP,
% │   \budMauryanFisherOR, \budMauryanFisherP,
% │   \NaraAntiDev, \NaraAntiKm, \KyotoAntiDev, \KyotoAntiKm,
% │   \HoryuAntiDev, \HoryuAntiKm, \SulaimanAntiDev, \SulaimanAntiKm
% └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% │ GROUP 5: Founding / Origin Test (Test E)
% │ Scripts: analysis/unesco/origin_sites_test.py                    [OK]
% │          analysis/unesco/founding_sites_analysis.py               [OK]
% │ Macros (origin_sites_test.py):
% │   \NoriginCorpus, \NoriginAp, \originApRate, \pOriginAll,
% │   \originEnrichAll,
% │   \NcanonSites, \NcanonAp, \canonApRate, \pCanon, \canonEnrich,
% │   \NpreTwoK, \NpreTwoKAp, \preTwoKApRate, \pPreTwoK, \preTwoKEnrich,
% │   \NmodernSites, \NmodernAp, \modernApRate, \pModern, \modernEnrich,
% │   \pFisherCanonModern, \orCanonModern,
% │   \NreligUnion, \NreligUnionAp, \religUnionApRate, \pReligUnion,
% │   \religUnionEnrich,
% │   \NchristSites, \NchristAp, \christApRate, \pChrist, \christEnrich
% │ Macros (founding_sites_analysis.py):
% │   \NthematicTotal, \NthematicFounding, \thematicFoundingPct,
% │   \NthematicCapital, \NthematicMonument, \NthematicSacred,
% │   \NthematicAxis, \NthematicLandscape, \NthematicUnclassified
% └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% │ GROUP 6: Founding Keyword Enrichment
% │ Script: analysis/unesco/founding_sites_analysis.py               [OK]
% │   (uses lib/founding_filter.py + config.json keywords)
% │ NOTE: founding_enrichment_test.py referenced in comments but does NOT
% │       exist in gerizim-paper-a repo. These macros are produced by
% │       founding_sites_analysis.py.
% │ Macros:
% │   \NfoundKwAll, \foundKwBaseRate, \NfoundKwAp, \foundKwApRate,
% │   \NfoundKwNonAp, \foundKwNonApRate, \foundKwFisherOR, \pFoundKwFisher
% └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% │ GROUP 7: Sacred Origin Test
% │ Script: analysis/unesco/sacred_origin_test.py                    [OK]
% │ Macros:
% │   \topHitOne, \topHitTwo, \topHitThree
% │ NOTE: These site names/deviations are descriptive labels; the numeric
% │       deviations come from the beru calculation in the underlying sweep.
% └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% │ GROUP 8: Meta-Keyword Test
% │ Script: analysis/unesco/meta_keyword_test.py                     [OK]
% │ Macros:
% │   \NmetaKeywords, \NmetaBeatingChi, \metaBeatingChiPct
% └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% │ GROUP 9: Temporal Gradient (Test 4)
% │ Script: analysis/unesco/temporal_gradient_test.py                 [OK]
% │ Macros:
% │   \ZcochranThree, \pCochranThree, \ZcochranFive, \pCochranFive,
% │   \NcohortA, \NcohortAap, \cohortArate,
% │   \NcohortB, \NcohortBap, \cohortBrate,
% │   \NcohortC, \NcohortCap, \cohortCrate,
% │   \NcohortD, \NcohortDap, \cohortDrate,

%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% │ GROUP 10: Sequential Inscription / Deep Temporal Analysis

% │ Macros:
% │   \peakSigYear, \peakSigN, \peakSigAp, \peakSigRate, \peakSigP,
% │   \peakNegLogP, \firstSigYear, \firstSigN, \firstSigRate,
% │   \NfirstHalf, \NapFirstHalf, \firstHalfRate, \pFirstHalf,
% │   \NsecondHalf, \NapSecondHalf, \secondHalfRate, \pSecondHalf,
% │   \halfFisherOR, \pHalfFisher,
% │   \NdatedSites, \NpreCE, \NpreCEap, \preCErate, \preCEenrich,
% │   \pPreCEbinom, \NpostCE, \NpostCEap, \postCErate,
% │   \earlyModernN, \earlyModernAp, \earlyModernRate, \pEarlyModern,
% │   \canonPostCEN, \canonPostCEap, \canonPostCErate, \pCanonPostCE,
% │   \blockOneRate, \pBlockOne, \blockThreeRate, \pBlockThree,
% │   \blockFiveRate, \pBlockFive
% └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

% │   analysis/unesco/tumulus_dome_evolution_test.py  [EXISTS IN gerizim-analysis ONLY]

% │   \NevoTotal, \NevoAp, \evoApRate, \evoEnrichAp, \pEvoAp,

% │ GROUP 22: World Peace Pagoda (Lumbini)
% │ Script: analysis/global/anchor_site_comparison.py                [OK]

% │       not in UNESCO XML). Computed alongside GROUP 16 macros.

% │   \WDctrlN, \WDctrlAp, \WDctrlRate, \WDctrlBinomP,
% │   \WDctrlOR, \WDctrlORlo, \WDctrlORhi, \WDctrlZp,
% │   \WDctrlPermP, \WDctrlMHOR, \WDctrlMHchi, \WDctrlMHp,

%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

% │   \domePhaseChiSq, \domePhaseChiP, \fullPhaseChiP,
% │   \domePhaseKSD, \domePhaseKSP, \domeGerizimPctile,

% │   \nonDomeBandN, \nonDomeBandAp, \nonDomeBandRate,

%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

% │ Script: analysis/unesco/simulation_null_model.py                 [OK]
% │ Macros:
% │   \simNperms, \simDomePermZ, \simDomePermP, \simDomeBootP,
% │   \simCanonPermP, \simPreTwoKPermP, \simPostTwoKPermP,
% │   \simKDEZ, \simKDEP, \simBootFullMean, \simBootFullStd,
% │   \simKDEMean, \simKDEStd
% └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% │ GROUP 26: Americas P1435 Control
% │ Script: analysis/americas/americas_harmonic_depletion_audit.py   [OK]
% │ Data:   data/store/wikidata/p1435_global_control.csv
% │ Macros:
% │   \AmericasCtrlN, \AmericasCtrlAp, \AmericasCtrlRate,
% │   \AmericasCtrlExpected, \AmericasCtrlDeplFactor, \pAmericasDepl
% └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% │ GROUP 27: Unit Sweep (fine-grained spacing sensitivity)
% │ Script: analysis/unesco/unit_sweep_fill.py                       [OK]
% │ NOTE: Produces the numbers in Tables 6 and 7 (unit sensitivity sweep).
% │       No macros defined for individual rows; values appear inline in
% │       the table environments in the manuscript body.
% └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
%
% ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% │ GROUP 28: Static / Manual Entries (not script-generated)
% │ Macros:
% │   \NwhcTotal (1248) — total WHC entries; from UNESCO XML file count
% │   \GerizimLon, \GerizimLatDMS, \GerizimLonDMS — UNESCO tentative list
% │     ref. 5706, DMS E35 16 08 (manually transcribed from UNESCO website)
% │   \JerusalemLon (35.232) — UNESCO XML coordinate
% │   \GerizimJerusalemSep, \GerizimJerusalemKm — manual calculation
% │     (|35.269 - 35.232| = 0.037°; 0.037 × ~111 km/° ≈ 4.0 km)
% └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
%
